title: 3D Muskets
body:
### **This is a resource pack for ewewukek's [musket mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/musket-mod)**
****Important: If you want the idle positions displayed in the video below, make sure you disable "Always aim in 3rd person" within the Musket mod config** ![config](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/07406522cc6fc8393517a5b97ce1f58a19e296b3.png) This pack is a continuation of Scarecrow01's [Flinkl0cks Pack](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/flintl0cks), the majority of the credit is his! # Scarecrow's original models/textures with slight alterations. ![musket](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2532a8c20fe49a1c24ff41af98f20a088bd678a8.png) ![bayonet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae8e55412fc313f05c995ee47088e96c83651b77.png) ![Flintlock Pistol](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d40064524cdcc759809b9dd25b105b15ed84123d.png) # Added blunderbuss model/texture. ![Blunderbuss](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/02f8dcc4be470c4c5275777d48d6baf48e0b689e.png) # Added scoped musket model/texture. ![Scoped Musket](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/69c110364d8006d1ae6eb7fab68caaa2bc99c6bf.png) ## Reworked third person musket hand positions ![gem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8dcbbb02123519ca995198ea5befa002d4844143.png) :D
